category_sources: Official ExifTool site describes it as a Perl library plus command-line application for reading, writing, and editing metadata.
source_facts.description: Perl library for reading and writing EXIF metadata.
display_name_sources: Official ExifTool site title is ExifTool by Phil Harvey.
docs_sources: Official ExifTool homepage links application documentation and extensive tag/file-format documentation.
Official exiftool_pod page is the application documentation.
repo_sources: GitHub repository is under the exiftool organization and identifies ExifTool by Phil Harvey; the official site provides source distributions but did not clearly link a source-control repository.
tags_sources: Official ExifTool site lists broad metadata formats and command-line capabilities.
source_facts.description identifies Perl library and EXIF metadata support.
